name: C3 Metals Inc.
summary: C3 Metals Inc. engages in the identification, acquisition, and exploration of copper and gold deposits in Peru, Jamaica, and Canada. The company's flagship property is the Jasperoide copper and gold project that covers an area of 57 square kilometers located in Southern Peru. It also holds projects in Jamaica, British Colombia, and Nova Scotia. The company was formerly known as Carube Copper Corp. and changed its name to C3 Metals Inc. in July 2020. C3 Metals Inc. is based in Toronto, Canada.
